---
title: PQ to PG
---

# Parquet to PostgreSQL

`db2pq` does not currently expose a first-class `pq_to_pg()` helper.

Today, the package is strongest in these directions:

- WRDS to Parquet
- PostgreSQL to Parquet
- WRDS to PostgreSQL

## Current adjacent helpers

- `pq_list_files()` lists Parquet outputs by schema.
- `pq_last_modified()` reads modification metadata embedded in Parquet files.
- `pq_archive()`, `pq_restore()`, and `pq_remove()` manage Parquet files in the
  local repository.

## Why this page exists

This page keeps the site organized by workflow, while being explicit that the
Parquet-to-PostgreSQL path is not yet a dedicated public API in `db2pq`.

If a `pq_to_pg()` workflow is added later, this page is the natural place to
document it.

## Related reference pages

- [pq_list_files](reference/files.paths.pq_list_files.qmd)
- [pq_last_modified](reference/files.parquet.pq_last_modified.qmd)
- [pq_archive](reference/files.parquet.pq_archive.qmd)
- [pq_restore](reference/files.parquet.pq_restore.qmd)
- [pq_remove](reference/files.parquet.pq_remove.qmd)
